title: Enterprise Service Request Intake Form Schema
description: Authoritative field definition for the Enterprise Service Request Intake Form template. Every field defined here has an exact 1:1 correspondence with a placeholder token in Template.docx.
validationNotes: All 42 fields are present in both this schema and Template.docx.
Field keys use SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE and match <<FIELD_KEY>> tokens in the Word template.
Enum fields must only accept values listed in enumValues.
Date fields must conform to ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).
Boolean fields accept true or false only.
String length constraints (minLength/maxLength) are enforced at mapping time.
Fields marked required: true must be populated before the document is considered complete.
Regex patterns in allowedPattern are ECMA-262 compatible.

fields.label: Full Name
fields.description: Legal full name of the person submitting the request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Letters (including accented), spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, and periods.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: Primary business email address of the requestor.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Valid email address format (user@domain.tld).

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.description: Direct phone number with country code for the requestor.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Digits, optional leading +, spaces, hyphens, parentheses, and periods.

fields.label: Job Title
fields.description: Current job title or role of the requestor.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.

fields.label: Department
fields.description: Department or business unit the requestor belongs to.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.

fields.label: Employee ID
fields.description: Unique organizational employee identifier.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

fields.label: Office Location
fields.description: Primary office or site location of the requestor.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.

fields.label: Direct Manager Name
fields.description: Full name of the requestor's direct manager or supervisor.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Letters (including accented), spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, and periods.

fields.label: Organization Name
fields.description: Legal name of the requesting organization or company.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.

fields.label: Division / Business Unit
fields.description: Specific division or business unit within the organization.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.

fields.label: Account Number
fields.description: Internal or CRM account number associated with the organization.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

fields.label: Cost Center
fields.description: Financial cost center code to be charged for this request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

fields.label: Organization Address
fields.description: Primary mailing or headquarters address of the organization.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.
fields.example: One Microsoft Way, Redmond, WA 98052, USA

fields.label: Industry Sector
fields.description: Primary industry classification for the organization.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Contract / Agreement ID
fields.description: Reference ID of the governing contract or service agreement.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and forward slashes.

fields.label: Request Title
fields.description: Short, descriptive title summarizing the request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.
fields.example: Provision New Azure Landing Zone for Project Atlas

fields.label: Request Type
fields.description: Category classification for the request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Priority Level
fields.description: Urgency / impact priority classification.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Date Submitted
fields.description: Date the request was formally submitted.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: ISO 8601 date format: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.label: Target Completion Date
fields.description: Desired date by which the request should be fulfilled.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: ISO 8601 date format: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.label: Detailed Description
fields.description: Comprehensive narrative describing the request, scope, and expected outcomes.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; may include line breaks and common punctuation.
fields.example: We require a new Azure landing zone configured with hub-spoke network topology to support the Project Atlas migration workload. The environment must include...

fields.label: Business Justification
fields.description: Explanation of why this request is needed and its business value.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; may include line breaks and common punctuation.
fields.example: Project Atlas is a strategic initiative to modernize our legacy ERP system. Delayed provisioning will impact the Q3 go-live target and result in estimated losses of...

fields.label: Target Environment
fields.description: Deployment environment for the requested service or change.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Platform / Technology Stack
fields.description: Primary platform, cloud provider, or technology stack involved.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text alphanumeric with common punctuation.
fields.example: Azure (App Service, SQL Database, Key Vault)

fields.label: System Dependencies
fields.description: Other systems, services, or APIs this request depends on.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; comma-separated list or narrative.
fields.example: Active Directory, SAP ERP, internal REST API gateway

fields.label: Data Classification
fields.description: Highest sensitivity level of data handled by this request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Estimated Number of Users
fields.description: Approximate number of end users who will use the service.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Non-negative integer.

fields.label: Availability / SLA Requirement
fields.description: Minimum uptime or SLA tier required.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Integration Endpoints
fields.description: External or internal endpoints this service integrates with.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; URLs, service names, or descriptions.
fields.example: https://api.contoso.com/v2, SAP RFC endpoint, Azure Event Hub

fields.label: Applicable Regulatory Frameworks
fields.description: Regulations, standards, or compliance frameworks that apply.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; comma-separated framework names.

fields.label: Data Residency Requirement
fields.description: Geographic region where data must reside.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) Involved?
fields.description: Whether the request involves processing or storing PII.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Boolean value: true or false.

fields.label: Risk Level Assessment
fields.description: Overall assessed risk level for this request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Security Review Completed?
fields.description: Whether a formal security review has been completed for this request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Boolean value: true or false.

fields.label: Additional Constraints / Notes
fields.description: Any other compliance constraints, legal limitations, or regulatory notes.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; may include line breaks and common punctuation.
fields.example: Data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. Annual penetration testing is required per our MSA.

fields.label: Primary Approver Name
fields.description: Full name of the primary person authorized to approve this request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Letters (including accented), spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, and periods.

fields.label: Primary Approver Email
fields.description: Business email address of the primary approver.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Valid email address format (user@domain.tld).

fields.label: Secondary Approver Name
fields.description: Full name of the secondary or backup approver (if applicable).
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Letters (including accented), spaces, apostrophes, hyphens, and periods.

fields.label: Approval Date
fields.description: Date the request was formally approved (if applicable).
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: ISO 8601 date format: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.label: Approval Status
fields.description: Current approval state of the request.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Must be one of the predefined values.

fields.label: Document Version
fields.description: Version identifier for this completed form instance.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Semantic version format: MAJOR.MINOR or MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.

fields.label: Additional Comments
fields.description: Any supplementary comments, context, or notes for reviewers.
fields.allowedCharactersDescription: Free-text; may include line breaks and common punctuation.
fields.example: Please expedite review — this is tied to a board-level initiative with a hard Q3 deadline.
